gdpr.title: Privacy Settings
gdpr.message: We value your privacy. We'd like to use analytics to improve your experience. This helps us understand how you use our app and make it better. You can change this setting anytime in the app settings.

errors.noConnectionMessage: Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.serviceUnavailableMessage: We're experiencing technical difficulties. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.audioPlaybackFailed: Failed to play audio. Please check your internet connection and try again.

station.playlistNotAvailable: This station doesn't have a playlist available
station.noPlaylistData: No playlist data available for this day

about.title: About Yotuna
about.description: Discover radio stations worldwide, track live playlists, and find songs on your favorite streaming services.
about.feature1: Browse thousands of radio stations worldwide
about.feature2: Live audio streaming directly in your browser
about.feature3: Track what's playing on each station in real-time
about.feature4: Open songs directly in Spotify, Deezer, Tidal or Apple Music
about.feature5: Save your favorite stations for quick access
about.feature7: Browser locale-aware date and time formatting
about.feature8: Copy track info to clipboard with one click
about.feature9: Available on iOS, Android and Web
about.discordDescription: Chat with other fans, report bugs, and suggest new features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. Here's how Yotuna handles your data.
privacy.localDataDescription: Your preferences (theme, language, favorites) are stored locally in your browser using localStorage. This data never leaves your device and is not transmitted to any server.
privacy.analyticsDescription: When you consent, we may collect anonymous usage data to improve the app experience. Analytics can be disabled at any time from the Settings page. No personal information is collected.
privacy.cookiesDescription: Yotuna uses localStorage for settings persistence. No tracking cookies are used. Third-party streaming service buttons (Spotify, Deezer, Tidal, Apple Music) link to external websites with their own privacy policies.
privacy.streamingDescription: When you click streaming service buttons, you are redirected to external websites (Spotify, Deezer, Tidal, Apple Music). These services have their own privacy policies that apply once you leave Yotuna.
privacy.audioStreamingDescription: Radio station streams are fetched directly from station servers. Yotuna acts as a player and does not process, record, or store any audio data.
privacy.contactDescription: For privacy-related questions, please reach out through our Discord community or visit yotuna.com.

favorites.limitReached: You've reached the limit of {{limit}} favorite stations.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
